title: Professional profile protocol for users of La Algarabia Occupational Centre
author: de la Hoz Ruiz, Javier
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This record documents an operational protocol for creating the professional profile of users of La Algarabia Occupational Centre. The product is a practical instrument for assessment, support planning, occupational guidance and possible socio-labour pathways. The protocol is organised around eleven dimensions: personal data and preferences, technical skills, communication, intrapersonal competences, interpersonal skills, problem solving, organisation and time management, adaptability, digital competences, supports and possible related jobs. Its value lies in giving the centre a common evidence-based format for decision-making and follow-up.
